name: studio
description: Project-management overlay for long-running Claude Code sessions. Advisory orchestration that picks up project state automatically (CHANGELOG, BACKLOG, HANDOFF docs, git, artefacts) and proposes next actions. Plus handoff docs, CHANGELOG continuity, rollback-as-release, user-judged A/B comparisons, structured investigation branches. Now ships with an MCP server (8 tools) for project-state intelligence + cross-session decision memory + plugin recommendations. Domain-agnostic — composes with any of the *-freedom plugins (audio, marketing, figma, webapp, cli, hardware) for full multi-domain workflows.
